prompt: Create ELN documentation for a co-immunoprecipitation (Co-IP) experiment. We investigated the interaction between endogenous p53 and MDM2 in U2OS cells under DNA damage conditions. DNA damage induced by 1 µM doxorubicin (Sigma-Aldrich D1515, lot SLBV6403) for 6 hours. Lysis: NP-40 buffer. IP antibody: anti-p53 (Santa Cruz sc-126, lot J2922, 4 µg/500 µg lysate) or IgG isotype control (Santa Cruz sc-2025). Protein G agarose beads (Roche 11719416001). Western detection: anti-MDM2 (Abcam ab16895, 1:500) and anti-p53 (CST 2527S, 1:1000). Input control: 10% of lysate. Expected: MDM2 co-IP with p53 enriched in doxorubicin condition.
